header.title: Checkbox
header.subtitle: Binary toggle for individual options or multi-item selection. Supports checked, unchecked, and indeterminate states with an optional label and description.

anatomy.title: Anatomy
anatomy.description: A checkbox is composed of a hidden native input, a visual control box with a check icon, and an optional label and description.

parts.control: Hidden native input element. Receives focus and keyboard events.
parts.box: Visual square rendered via CSS :has(). Changes to accent color when checked or indeterminate.
parts.icon: Check or Minus icon inside the box. Visible only in checked or indeterminate state.
parts.label: Short text identifying the option. Rendered as a span inside the label element.
parts.description: Supporting text below the label. Use for hints or caveats.

states.title: States
states.description: Checkbox supports four visual states: unchecked, checked, indeterminate (partial selection), and disabled.

group.title: Group
group.description: Combine multiple checkboxes with a parent indeterminate state to represent partial selection in a list.

props.title: Props
props.description: Extends all native input attributes except type. Component-specific props listed below.

demos.descriptionMarketing: Get product updates and promotional offers.

props.label: Label text rendered next to the control.
props.description: Supporting text rendered below the label.
props.indeterminate: Sets the indeterminate visual state. Useful for parent checkboxes in a multi-select list.
props.extendsNote: Extends all native input attributes except type (name, value, onChange, …).
